security.csp: default-src 'self'; connect-src 'self' ipc: http://ipc.localhost https://codex.52cx.top; img-src 'self' asset: http://asset.localhost data:; style-src 'self' 'unsafe-inline'; script-src 'self' 'unsafe-inline'; object-src 'none'; base-uri 'none'; frame-ancestors 'none'

bundle.longDescription: Codex+++ desktop client for logging in, checking token balance, requesting token top-ups, checking local Codex status, installing Codex automatically, and launching Codex.
